request.description: Attaches a tokenized payment method to a customer. Uses deterministic mock processing: last4 ending in "5" ΓåÆ expired, otherwise active. Emits `payment_method.created`.

request.description: Confirms a setup intent by attaching a payment method and transitioning through CREATED ΓåÆ PROCESSING ΓåÆ SUCCEEDED/FAILED. Uses deterministic mock: payment methods with last4 ending in "5" fail, otherwise succeed. Emits `setup_intent.succeeded` or `setup_intent.failed`.

response.name: Setup intent confirmed; final status is succeeded or failed.
